Use the Gen2 delegate tool with the exact argument names task_in, process, and data_out. Set task_in to return valid JSON only: an array with exactly two objects [{"name":"Mercury","kind":"planet"},{"name":"Venus","kind":"planet"}]. Set process.tools_allowlist to ["dataset_save"]. Use the Gen2 delegate tool with the exact argument names task_in, process, and data_out. Set data_out.result_target to "file:datauser/test_delegate/delegate_report.txt". In your answer, report the delegated task id only.
Collect the delegated task result and answer with a short confirmation that includes delegate_report.txt.
